## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the approach you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

What other solutions did you consider and why did you reject them?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

Links to relevant standards (e.g. HL7 FHIR specs), ADRs, or prior discussions.
